## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run smoke` passes (game, every editor tab, and `/shots` load with no console errors)
- [ ] No game nouns in `engine/` or `editors/` (see [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) §2)
- [ ] New behavior has a test in `tests/`
